Related Entities

  • hospital SAINT ALPHONSUS MEDICAL CENTER - NAMPA 4-star overall rating
  • hospital WEST VALLEY MEDICAL CENTER 5-star overall rating
  • hospital ST LUKE'S NAMPA MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • snf CALDWELL CARE OF CASCADIA 2-star, 68 beds
  • snf ORCHARDS OF CASCADIA, THE 1-star, 100 beds
  • snf CANYON WEST OF CASCADIA 4-star, 103 beds
  • snf MEADOW VIEW NURSING AND REHABILITATION 3-star, 122 beds
  • snf WELLSPRING HEALTH & REHABILITATION OF CASCADIA 4-star, 120 beds
  • snf SUNNY RIDGE 2-star, 43 beds
  • snf KARCHER POST ACUTE 2-star, 66 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
